author: Murasaki
review: PTLA management appears to have an "absent management" business model. Locations do not appear to have full time staff, and I attempted at this property and others in the Bellingham area to get a walk through of various listed studio and

ownerResponse.text: Thank you for your feedback, and we apologize that you've had difficulty connecting with someone from our team. Please call our Mahogany Manor office directly to speak with our dedicated staff member for this community.

author: Brian McGough
review: Won't let you see your apartment beforehand, bad neighbors who don't pic up after dogs. I never walked my dog off leash but was threatened with a $300 fine for walking my dog off leash.

author: Skye T
review: Psycho prices, an insult to Washingtonians.

ownerResponse.text: Thank you for your feedback. We would love the opportunity to address your concerns, but unfortunately we don't have any record of you in our system. Please feel free to reach out to us at your earliest convenience and we would be happy to speak with you.
